items.name: J. Marlowe
items.quote: Being able to check the contract after every spin is what got me to actually trust the wheel.

items.name: A. Novak
items.quote: First casino UI where the transaction hash matters more to me than the confetti animation.

items.name: R. Osei
items.quote: Non-custodial setup meant I never had to wonder where my balance actually lived.

items.name: S. Lindqvist
items.quote: Clean dashboard, clear odds, no surprise terms buried in a FAQ somewhere.
